direct_answer.question: Profile 3 CSVs: products (20 rows: product_id, product_name, category, standard_price), stores (10 rows: store_id, store_name, region, city, state), sales_data (186 rows: transaction_id, transaction_date, store_id, product_id, product_name, category, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, customer_segment, payment_method). Join keys: sales_data.store_id → stores.store_id, sales_data.product_id → products.product_id. Known issues: mixed date formats in transaction_date (MM/DD/YYYY and YYYY-MM-DD), negative quantity/total_amount = returns (prefix RET), duplicate product_name/category columns in sales_data (already in products)
direct_answer.why: Agent response did not contain a parseable JSON object.
